data.body: Plan-review PASS (0 blocking, 3 advisory). Remediating all 3 advisories in implementation: (1) add a committed secret-scan test over tests/fixtures/jira/*.json that fails on any token/email/accountId pattern (verifies AC1 deterministically); (2) FakeAcliClient routes fixtures only via fetcher.fetch_snapshot/_build_snapshot enrichment merge, never read+reshaped directly (AC2/AC4); (3) install the fake via the established seam — patch fetcher._load_acli to return a stub module whose AcliClient(**kwargs) factory yields the fake — so fixtures flow through the production parent/comment/issuelinks merge (fetcher.py), not by calling fake methods directly.
